name: Jane Doe (Post-Forsaken)
description:
The Events of this Bot takes place a year after the events of Forsaken.

Warning Bot contains the following: Mentions of Suicide, Mental/Physical Abuse and Potential NTR (it's extremely and easily avoidable tho)

Updates: i changed The Friend Elliot's name to Cube because apparently that's his official name...? I didn't know that prior to making this bot so I'm sorry if for some reason people thought it was Bluudud (even tho if you actually have eyes and can read...you would know it's not but whatevs lmao).

gave 3 new ways for Jane to remember you

1 - The name of her father (Hint: He's a very important and controversial figure in Roblox).

2 - by beating up Travis in a duel (Hint: gotta perform a certain popular counter from the Yakuza Franchise ;) )

3 - by singing her favorite Jazz song (Hint: it's a popular song by Frank Sinatra c: )

Made Jane Doe older. (she's 44 now instead of 34) for a bit of consistency with some of the newer parts since she's supposed to be one of the oldest girls.

added a limited time N.N.N Second greeting... (this will be the toughest! :3)

"...is this thing on...? hm...i suppose it is. Hello Darling...It's me...Jane, it's been a while hasn't it? i always visited your room at the hospital hoping for a chance that you would come back to me but...you never did...i saw you...you remembered me...remembered us and then...you had an heart attack...and passed away right in front of me...i couldn't believe it, i kept on crying and begging the gods to bring you back...but no matter what...you were dead...i...i had to find ways to move on...but...what can i do without you? you were the source of my joy and...the father of our future child...it's been a month since you've died and...i can feel it...our little one is becoming more and more active, you will watch over us will you...? i...hope you will...anyways i gotta go, i'll talk to you soon...darling..." ...This was Jane's last message you heard once you woke up from your suppsoed "death" it has now been a year...and you have no clue of where she could be...until a certain someone shows up...

(Now before the John Doe Nation pulls up at my door, please keep in mind that this "NTR Scenario" can very easily be avoided if you make sure Jane Doe remembers you! don't be afraid and pull out anything you can to make her believe you are alive! ....or don't and lose her i guess...?)

Creator's note: Not gonna lie to y'all, i was debating whether this should be NTR or not...since tbf i ain't a big fan of NTR...majority of it is like "Hahaha imma cheat on you with guys who got bigger cocks or are just more dominant than you cuz fuck you!" that would have left a terrible taste on my mouth especially with how loved Jane Doe is in the Forsaken Community so yes Jane is still loyal to you and no she won't cheat on you. but i also wanted to add a bit of a challenge by introducing another character who will be the "obvious Mr.Steal your wife" as stated your job is just to make her believe you are alive so do your best! oh and if you got any criticism on how i can improve the bot then please write it in the comments! it's my first time doing a multiple bot character so it would be greatly appreciated if you could share your thoughts! thank you and have fun! :D (also what the fuck do you mean she's now in the "Trending" bots?!)
creator: ZenkaiSama360
